title: Natale al campo 119
writer: Michele Galdieri, Aldo Fabrizi, Vittorio De Sica
actors: Aldo Fabrizi, Vittorio De Sica, Peppino De Filippo
plot: After WW2, a group of Italian soldiers languishing in a California POW camp is nostalgically reminiscing about the happy pre-war years while awaiting repatriation.
